# Ant I Gravity Studios

Ant I Gravity Studios is a high-performance startup ecosystem merging cutting-edge software engineering, custom artificial intelligence systems, hyper-realistic VFX production, and next-generation animation studios.

## Project Directory & Sections
- **Home**: Landing page ("Welcome to Ant I Gravity, Defining Entertainment")
- **Leadership**: Board & Executive officers:
  - **Ajay Raj B.K**: Founder & Creative Director
  - **Shashank Raj B.K**: Co-Founder & CEO
  - **Thontadaraya**: CTO (Technology Head)
  - **Munish**: CMO (Marketing Head)
- **Media Showcase**: Video gallery and VFX portfolio.
- **Revenue & Growth**: Financial projections and strategic commercial directive.
- **Hierarchy & Org Chart**: Node-based structure of operational tiers.
- **Milestone Timeline**: Historical timeline of accomplishments.
- **Creative & Tech Departments**: Catalog of the 18 active sub-departments.

## Core Technologies
- Frontend: Vanilla HTML, CSS, JavaScript
- Libraries: Three.js (WebGL Cosmic Background), Lucide (SVG Icons), Razorpay checkout SDK
- Integration: Supabase client SDK for cloud database sync
